name: query_flights_at_risk
description: Flights at risk of delay: flights checking in through a zone departing within a time window

name: query_checkin_metrics
description: Check-in metrics for a given flight: zone, departure time, delay risk, and status

name: query_checkin_performance_metrics
description: Check-in performance metrics: latest avg check-in time, baseline, % change vs baseline, and anomaly flag per zone. Pass empty string for all zones.

name: query_available_agents_for_redeployment
description: Available agents for redeployment: check-in agents currently on break or available. Pass empty string for all zones.

name: query_border_officer_staffing
description: Border officer staffing: counts officers at post (ACTIVE), away, or on break by zone

name: query_border_officers_by_post
description: Border officers grouped by post status: counts and lists officer IDs/names per status

name: query_border_terminal_details
description: Border terminals: lists each terminal with status plus totals per status

name: query_checkin_agent_staffing
description: Check-in agent staffing: counts agents at counter (ACTIVE) vs away or on break

name: query_checkin_agents_by_counter_status
description: Check-in agents grouped by counter status: counts per status and lists agent IDs/names

name: query_egate_availability
description: E-gate availability: counts terminals operational vs out of service by zone

name: query_staffing_duties
description: Staffing duties: new assignments for an agent (zone, counter, assigned by, assigned at)

name: update_flight_risk
description: Mark a flight as at-risk or normal (updates delay_risk field)

name: update_border_officer
description: Update a border officer's post status (ACTIVE, AWAY, BREAK)

name: confirm_arrival
description: Confirm a check-in agent has arrived at their assigned counter
